entity.summary: Argentine cryptocurrency trading platform serving Latin American users. Nexo announced the acquisition of Buenbit in December 2025, but HEI keeps the entity active because the acquisition announcement alone does not establish terminal shutdown or brand disappearance.
entity.notes: The December 2025 Nexo transaction is modeled as an ownership event rather than a terminal status change. Launch date remains null because this research cluster did not recover a sufficiently strong launch marker.

events.title: Nexo announced the acquisition of Buenbit
events.description: Nexo announced that it was acquiring the Argentina-based crypto trading platform Buenbit as part of its Latin America expansion strategy.
events.notes: The acquisition is treated as an ownership event. No terminal shutdown is inferred from the transaction announcement.

evidence.title: Buenbit exchange entry
evidence.notes: Registry source used to identify Buenbit as an exchange candidate and provide a current-status signal for review.

evidence.title: Crypto firm Nexo purchases Argentina's Buenbit in Latin America expansion
evidence.notes: Reports Nexo's acquisition of Buenbit and describes Buenbit as an Argentina-based crypto trading platform operating in Argentina and Peru.
